data.title: BlackRock's Tokenized Fund Makes Significant Deposit on Polygon Network
data.description: According to PANews, on-chain data reveals that BlackRock's tokenized fund, BUIDL, has executed a substantial deposit of approximately $500 million on the Polygon network. The CEO of Polygon has confirmed that this transaction is indeed part of BlackRock's BUIDL deployment.

data.title: Ethereum Gathers Strength — Upside Breakout Could Confirm Recovery Phase
data.description:
Ethereum price started a recovery wave from $3,700. ETH is moving higher but faces a couple of key hurdles near $3,900 and $3,955. Ethereum started a fresh recovery above $3,780 and $3,820. The price is trading above $3,850 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/eth/ethereum-gathers-strength-3800/

data.title: Thai court rules to reopen extradition proceedings for She Zhijiang, who was previously involved in illegal blockchain financing projects
data.description: The extradition case of She Zhijiang from Thailand, which had been suspended two months ago, has seen progress. The Thai Constitutional Court has ruled that the extradition does not violate the Thai Constitution. This may reopen She Zhijiang's extradition proceedings after more than three years in detention in Thailand. It is reported that She Zhijiang once built the Asia-Pacific New City in the Shuigou Valley area on the Thai-Myanmar border, claiming that the project was the first to implement blockchain technology for global financing. However, he actually engaged in online gambling and telecommunications fraud operations. (Caixin.com)

data.title: An early UNI investment institution transferred another 2.5 million UNI tokens, possibly through Wintermute.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, an investor/institutional address (0xf04...9e60), which received a 30 million UNI investment allocation in 2020, transferred 2.5 million UNI (worth $15.75 million) to another address an hour ago. This receiving address had previously transferred 1.882 million UNI to Wintermute six days prior.

data.title: Standard Chartered Predicts Bitcoin Drop Below $100K Even as Global M2 Growth Turns Bullish
data.description:
Global macro signals are flashing both warning and opportunity for Bitcoin (BTC). On one hand, major bank Standard Chartered PLC has flagged the potential for Bitcoin to dip below $100,000 in the near term. Related Reading: 16,000 Ancient Bitcoins Just Moved—And It’s Costing Whales Billions On the other hand, significant growth in global M2 money supply strengthens the backdrop for a longer-term upside. Short-Term Correction Predicted as Trade & Liquidity Risks Mount According to head of digital asset research Geoff Kendrick at Standard Chartered, Bitcoin could briefly fall under the $100,000 mark amid intensifying global risks, particularly the escalating U
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/standard-chartered-predicts-bitcoin-drop-below-100k-even-as-global-m2-growth-turns-bullish/

data.title: Stable's $825 million pre-deposit quota sold out in seconds, prompting community concerns about insider trading.
data.description: After the stablecoin Layer 1 project Stable announced its first phase of pre-deposit funding, the $825 million allocated to the project sold out instantly, sparking community concerns about insider trading. Verification revealed the official announcement was released at 9:10 AM Beijing time, while on-chain data showed the first deposit was made at 8:48 AM, pre-announcement. A rough estimate suggests that over 70% of the deposits were made before the announcement.

data.title: Trader who made $190M shorting crash also apparently bet on CZ’s pardon
data.description:
While some onchain sleuths called it “obvious insider knowledge,” others argued that Trump’s pardon of Changpeng Zhao was expected.

data.title: "Trump pardons CZ" tops Reddit's top trending topic
data.description: According to the official page, "Trump pardons CZ" ranked second on the Reddit topic list.

data.title: Analysts: If US CPI is higher than expected, it may weaken the expectation of interest rate cut
data.description: Asian currencies consolidated against the dollar in early trading ahead of the release of U.S. September CPI data later on Friday. Matt Simpson, an analyst at StoneX, said money markets are currently pricing in a 99% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut from the Federal Reserve next week and another 25 basis point cut in December. A higher-than-expected CPI figure could challenge these expectations and drive a broad-based dollar higher. (Jinshi)

data.title: On-Chain Data Reveals Significant USDT Deposit Prior to Announcement
data.description: According to Foresight News, Aggr News reports that on-chain data indicates a substantial deposit of 500 million USDT into 10 wallet clusters associated with Stable Treasury owners before an official announcement was made.

data.title: Cathie Wood announced that she has invested in Quantum Solutions, a Japanese Ethereum treasury company
data.description: Cathie Wood, founder and CEO of Ark Invest, announced on the X platform that she has invested in Quantum Solutions, a Japanese Ethereum treasury company, to further expand innovative channels in the global capital market.

data.title: Chinese decentralized contract exchange Sun Wukong: $100 million Tongzhou Plan aims to rebuild market confidence, registration is in full swing
data.description: On the evening of October 23rd, SunPerp, the world's first Chinese-language decentralized contract trading platform, hosted a livestream event titled "SunPerp's 72nd Debate: A Margin Call Confession!" The event featured industry influencers and traders reviewing the market impact of the October 11th Black Swan event. Regarding the recently launched $100 million "Same Boat Plan," the platform stated that the initiative aims to provide special subsidies and restart support to traders affected by the Black Swan event, fostering a healthy trading environment and restoring market confidence. According to official information, SunPerp's trading volume on the 22nd reached 80 million USDT, bringing its cumulative trading volume to over 2.5 billion USDT and total capital invested to 73 million USDT. Currently, the Sun Wukong $100 million fellowship plan is ongoing. From 08:00 on October 10, 2025 to 07:59 on October 12, 2025, users with margin calls >50U on any DEX platform can apply for an incentive fund of up to 5,000 USDT. Registration will end on November 25.

data.title: Federal Reserve's October Rate Cut Likely, CME Reports
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the CME's FedWatch tool indicates a 98.3% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in October, ahead of the upcoming CPI data release. The likelihood of maintaining the current rate stands at 1.7%.

Looking ahead to December, there is a 93.4% chance of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut, while the probability of a 25 basis point cut is 6.5%. The chance of keeping rates unchanged is minimal at 0.1%.

The next two Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings are scheduled for October 29 and December 10.

data.title: Stable: The first phase of the pre-deposit campaign has reached the upper limit of US$825 million
data.description: Stable, a Layer 1 stablecoin project, announced on the X platform that the first phase of its pre-deposit campaign has reached its cap of $825 million. Furthermore, Stable stated that more activities are coming soon.

data.title: Nevada halts cryptocurrency custodian Fortress Trust
data.description: Nevada regulators issued a cease and desist order against cryptocurrency custodian Fortress Trust (now Elemental Financial Technologies Inc.) on October 22. According to court documents, the company is on the verge of bankruptcy and faces a significant mismatch between its assets and liabilities. The order specifically states that Fortress's liquidity position is "completely insufficient to meet its obligations to customers." (Bloomberg)

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Trump pardoned Binance founder CZ, claiming he was innocent and persecuted by the Biden administration. 2. CZ expressed gratitude for Trump's pardon and pledged to do everything in his power to help the US become the capital of cryptocurrency. 3. The US September CPI report, released today, may struggle to shake expectations of an interest rate cut. 4. A decline in US bank reserves supports the Fed's decision to end the QT (Quick Turnover) policy. 5. A dormant Bitcoin wallet for 14.4 years transferred 150 BTC, valued at $16.56 million. 6. The "whale with a 100% win rate since October 11th" achieved its 12th consecutive win streak, accumulating $12.634 million in profits. 7. Ethereum's ACDE 223rd meeting confirmed the Fusaka upgrade schedule, bringing BPO1's launch date forward to December 9th. 8. Robinhood has launched HYPE spot trading. 9. Registration is now open for the BNB Hack: Local Series hackathon, jointly launched by BNB Chain and YZI Labs. 10. Paxos launches a payroll feature in the form of the stablecoin USDG.

data.title: Investor Transfers 2.5 Million UNI Tokens Worth $15.75 Million
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, monitoring by EmberCN has revealed that an investor or institution, which received an allocation of 30 million UNI tokens in 2020, transferred 2.5 million UNI tokens valued at $15.75 million. This transfer occurred one hour ago and is expected to continue moving into Wintermute for sale.

Previously, six days ago, the same address transferred 1.882 million UNI tokens, equivalent to $11.61 million, to Wintermute.

data.title: Thai Court Approves Extradition in High-Profile Case
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the extradition case of She Zhijiang from Thailand has seen progress after being delayed for two months. The Thai Constitutional Court has ruled that the extradition does not violate the country's constitution, potentially restarting the process after She Zhijiang's detention in Thailand for over three years.

Caixin reports that She Zhijiang was involved in developing the Asia-Pacific New City in the Shui Gou Gu area near the Thai-Myanmar border. The project was initially presented as the first global financing initiative utilizing blockchain technology. However, it was later revealed to be a front for online gambling and telecom fraud operations.

data.title: Messari: ETH spot ETF total inflows exceeded BTC spot ETFs for the first time in Q3
data.description: Messari data shows that ETH spot ETFs attracted $8.7 billion in inflows in the third quarter, while BTC spot ETFs saw $7.5 billion. BlackRock's ETHA dominated the ETH spot ETF market, both in dollar terms and in terms of percentage gains. ETHA's assets under management (AUM) increased by 266.1% quarter-over-quarter, from $4.4 billion to $16 billion, reaching a 58.2% market share at the end of the quarter.
